mapper.insert: INSERT INTO upload_task ( task_id, file_name, status, error_msg, create_time, finish_time, total_chunks, processed_chunks, success_chunks, failed_chunks, retry_count, file_path, doc_type, upload_status ) VALUES ( #{taskId}, #{fileName}, #{status}, #{errorMsg}, #{createTime}, #{finishTime}, COALESCE(#{totalChunks}, 0), COALESCE(#{processedChunks}, 0), COALESCE(#{successChunks}, 0), COALESCE(#{failedChunks}, 0), COALESCE(#{retryCount}, 0), #{filePath}, #{docType}, #{uploadStatus} )
mapper.update: UPDATE upload_task SET status = #{status}, error_msg = #{errorMsg}, finish_time = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'SUCCESS' OR #{status} = 'FAILED' THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE finish_time END WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, task_id AS taskId, file_name AS fileName, status, error_msg AS errorMsg, create_time AS createTime, finish_time AS finishTime, total_chunks AS totalChunks, processed_chunks AS processedChunks, success_chunks AS successChunks, failed_chunks AS failedChunks, retry_count AS retryCount, file_path AS filePath, doc_type AS docType, upload_status AS uploadStatus FROM upload_task WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.update: UPDATE upload_task SET status = 'PROCESSING' WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'FAILED')
UPDATE upload_task SET total_chunks = #{totalChunks}, processed_chunks = 0, success_chunks = 0, failed_chunks = 0 WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
UPDATE upload_task SET processed_chunks = processed_chunks + 1, success_chunks = success_chunks + 1 WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
UPDATE upload_task SET processed_chunks = processed_chunks + 1, failed_chunks = failed_chunks + 1 WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
UPDATE upload_task SET status = 'DEAD', error_msg = #{errorMsg}, finish_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
